Patch Set 3:

(6 comments)

It is a bit tricky to land the first patch without interop support, since there is no guarantee that this will land together with the previous patch.

It would probably make sense to just merge this patch into the previous one so that the interop support is included in the first patch.

Abandoned

Merge to its parent patch.

commit.subject: LU-1158 general: interop of nanosecond timestamps
commit.message:
LU-1158 general: interop of nanosecond timestamps

Support interop between client and server.
One of them supports nanosecond timestamps and the other does not.

Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.15.62
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.15.62
Change-Id: I05a7c2866e038977b5362e18a2affdfd51d06b62
